source: FERC Office of Enforcement, Division of Audits & Accounting
source_note: FERC audit report (Letter order issuing Audit Report), FA24-3; accession resolved via eLibrary AdvancedSearch API (searchText=FA24-3) during the 2026-06-19 corpus refresh (post-dates the 2026-02-03 /audits snapshot).

findings.title: Accounting for Replacement of Minor Items of Property
findings.summary: SEGCO improperly capitalized costs related to the replacement of minor items of property in a manner that was not consistent with its units of property listing and the Commission’s accounting requirements. SEGCO’s accounting caused utility plant to be overstated and maintenance expenses to be understated.

findings.title: Allowance for Funds Used During Construction
findings.summary: SEGCO improperly accrued allowance for funds used during construction (AFUDC) on projects that were completed or ready to be placed into service. As a result, SEGCO over accrued AFUDC and overstated electric plant in service during the audit period.

findings.title: Computation of Depreciation Rates
findings.summary: SEGCO improperly used a depreciation rate for computing depreciation expense for transmission plant that was not on file with the Commission.

findings.title: FERC Form Nos. 1 and 3-Q Reporting
findings.summary: SEGCO did not properly follow the FERC Form Nos. 1 and 3-Q instructions and, therefore, did not report all required information in its FERC Form Nos. 1 and 3-Q filings. These actions reduced the transparency, accuracy, and usefulness of certain information in the reports. D.
